description.text: Fight over, under, and through trenches to reach the opposing forces. One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: Fight over, under, and through trenches to reach the opposing forces. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Сражайся в, над, под и через окопы, чтобы прорваться к вражеским силам. Один куб, одна база.

es.original: Fight over, under, and through trenches to reach the opposing forces. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Atraviesa las trincheras para atacar a los enemigos.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: Fight over, under, and through trenches to reach the opposing forces. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Kämpft über, unter und in den Schützengräben, um eure Gegner zu erreichen. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

pt.original: Fight over, under, and through trenches to reach the opposing forces. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Lute em cima, embaixo e pelas trincheiras para alcançar os oponentes. Um Cubo e uma Base.

fr.original: Fight over, under, and through trenches to reach the opposing forces. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Affrontez les forces ennemies à tous les niveaux. Un cube et une base.
